description: Score predictions against ground truth with a standardized TDC metric (ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, F1, Accuracy, RMSE, MAE, R2, Spearman, Pearson, ...).
rules: read-only — pure metric computation over a local predictions file
degrades gracefully (skipped report) when the tdc package is absent
the metric name and score are written to record_store as eval.json
usage: Set TDC_METRIC (e.g. MAE, RMSE, ROC-AUC) and TDC_PRED (path to a JSON file with y_true and y_pred arrays). Output: eval.json.
limitation: Read-only. Requires the PyTDC package for the Evaluator; offline it emits a skipped report. y_true and y_pred must be equal-length numeric arrays appropriate for the chosen metric.
